textByHashes.b1c157f1230d8f92ef30e8a05ea5bea6ba4c96c5: Oh, Saradomin's light! Rescue at last!
textByHashes.39c3b28a518c56ed5a39fb0fedb5553559ff354c: You've saved my life! I thought I was done for...
textByHashes.191eaa8fbd42600e91402f548ec4c38acc83cd6a: Thank you! And to think, this day could have been my last...
